title: Li Auto Free Cash Flow Trends 2020-2024
text: Li Auto's free cash flow analysis reveals significant trends over the 2020-2024 period. Free cash flow was RMB8.2 billion (US$1.1 billion) in 2024, representing a dramatic decrease of 81.4% from RMB44.2 billion in 2023. This represents a significant decline in free cash flow generation year-over-year. Operating cash flow remained solid at RMB15.9 billion for the full year of 2024, with net income of RMB8.0 billion. Li Auto's cash flow statement exhibits strong free cash flow to net income ratio of 1.84, highlighting effective cash management. Additionally, the operating cash flow to net income ratio is 2.41, demonstrating strong cash generation from operations. Year-end cash reserve remained solid at RMB112.8 billion, laying a sound foundation for future growth. The sharp decline in free cash flow from 2023 to 2024 suggests increased capital expenditures related to new product development and manufacturing capacity expansion for BEV platforms. Management is investing significantly in autonomous driving technology and new EV model development, which is constraining free cash flow despite solid operating cash flow generation.
